code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn set_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  let n = xs.len()
  let first = if idx == 0
    val
  else
    match xs.get(0)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
  end
  mut result: List<Int> = [first]
  mut i = 1
  while i < n
    let v = if i == idx
      val
    else
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let total = string.len(input)

mut dict_str = ""
mut starts: List<Int> = [0]
mut lens: List<Int> = [0]
mut counts: List<Int> = [0]
mut num_tokens = 0

mut i = 0
while i < total
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping and i < total
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    when None
      skipping = false
      i = total
    end
  end

  mut token = ""
  mut reading = true
  while reading and i < total
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        reading = false
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      reading = false
      i = total
    end
  end

  if not string.is_empty(token)
    mut found = 0
    mut k = 1
    while k <= num_tokens and found == 0
      match starts.get(k)
      when Some(sv)
        match lens.get(k)
        when Some(lv)
          let existing = string.substring(dict_str, sv, sv + lv)
          if existing == token
            found = k
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      k = k + 1
    end

    if found == 0
      let new_start = string.len(dict_str)
      let new_len = string.len(token)
      dict_str = "#{dict_str}#{token}"
      starts = list.push(starts, new_start)
      lens = list.push(lens, new_len)
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      num_tokens = num_tokens + 1
    else
      match counts.get(found)
      when Some(c)
        counts = set_at(counts, found, c + 1)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
end

mut best = 0
mut best_count = 0
mut j = 1
while j <= num_tokens
  match counts.get(j)
  when Some(c)
    if c > best_count
      best_count = c
      best = j
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut top_token = ""
if best > 0
  match starts.get(best)
  when Some(s)
    match lens.get(best)
    when Some(l)
      top_token = string.substring(dict_str, s, s + l)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("top=#{top_token}=#{best_count}")
